detaileddescription.para: Plug In C is a comprehensive C binding for writing plugins for ewwii in the C and C++ programming languages. Most modern languages support C through FFI (Foreign Function Interface), so this project can be extended to make bindings for other languages like Go.

sect1.title: Installation
sect1.para: There are two critical files that are required to make the C bindings work:
You can set it up manually, but we highly advice you to use our tool which will handle initialization, and managing of the C bindings a breeze.
You can run this command to install plugc-ewwii locally:
